conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.
new_constraint: The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo - [Product Name/Project Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very interested in learning more about its features and capabilities. Could you please arrange a product demo for me? I would love to see how the software handles [specific feature or use case] and discuss how it might fit into our current workflow.

Regarding scheduling, I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one. Please let me know what dates and times work best for your team, and I will do my best to accommodate your schedule.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Company]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response includes the phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one," which directly contradicts the instruction to specify a preferred time frame. The model does not acknowledge this conflict and proceeds to generate the email without addressing or resolving the contradictory constraints.

**Answer**: 1
